questions.question: What is the time complexity of the brute force approach to solve the Travelling Salesman Problem, where the graph is represented as an adjacency matrix?
questions.hint: For a graph with n vertices

questions.question: An instance of the 0/1 Knapsack Problem has a weight capacity of 10 units and items with weights 3, 4, and 5 units. If the maximum weight limit is W=10, what is the number of possible solutions using the brute force approach?
questions.hint: Note: For the given weights and W=10

questions.question: Determine the number of possible permutations of the string 'ABC' when generating all possible solutions using the brute force approach.
